hero.title: Agentic Software Engineering
hero.description: I build agent-powered software using Claude CLI, OpenCode, Cursor, Antigravity CLI, and Aider. Specialist in Spec-Driven Development with efficient context management for token optimization. I apply TDD with agents, automated agent code review, human-agent refinement loops, and multi-agent orchestration. Author of Live and Let Code framework — production-ready agentic development methodology with agents-first design.

technologies.title: Agent-First Tech Stack
technologies.subtitle: Technologies organized by layers — AI/Agents as core, full-stack as support

llmTerminals.title: LLM Terminals
llmTerminals.description: Claude CLI, OpenCode, Cursor, Antigravity, Aider

timeline.title: About Me
timeline.about: Technology professional working in the market since 1996. Currently I manage the dynamic development unit of the Court of Justice of Ceará, where we apply low-code/no-code technologies combined with business process automation tools. Knowledge in developing Web/Mobile applications with React/Next.js and Tailwind. Using backend with Headless CMS or developed with Node.js/Express. Applying SEO techniques to ensure the client's brand is always highlighted in search results. Knowledge in Cloud platforms and how they can help companies reduce costs in operating their systems, as well as using data exploration services.

methodology.title: Agentic Development Methodology
methodology.subtitle: Open-source framework for Spec-Driven Development with agents. Transforms functional specifications into production-ready code through multi-agent orchestration.

phase1.title: Spec Definition
phase1.description: Clear functional specification with acceptance criteria

phase3.title: Code Generation + Review
phase3.description: Agent implementation with automated code review

benefits.benefit1: Consistency: Specs as single source of truth
benefits.benefit4: Flexibility: Human in the loop for complex decisions
